description_long: This is a black, angular stealth aircraft with a distinctive triangular shape and sharply faceted surfaces, reminiscent of the Lockheed F-117 Nighthawk. The body is low-profile, with a cockpit canopy set near the front and two vertical stabilizers at the rear. The wings are broad and seamlessly integrated into the fuselage, giving the vehicle a flat, wedge-like appearance. Various insignia and markings are visible on the wings and fuselage, including military emblems and identification numbers. The surface appears to be made of matte, radar-absorbing material, with minimal visible seams or rivets. No external weaponry or landing gear is visible, emphasizing its streamlined, stealth-oriented design.
description: A black, angular stealth aircraft with a triangular, faceted body, military markings, and a matte finish. The design is sleek and low-profile, with integrated wings and vertical stabilizers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharply pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and wide, triangular wings with visible military insignia.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low-profile fuselage, cockpit placement, and the two vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, exhaust area, and the broad, flat wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the aircraft's angular profile and additional markings.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body appears to be covered in faceted, likely thick composite armor plating with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid black paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star-and-bar insignia on wings and fuselage, small red and yellow warning labels, and identification numbers on the tail and sides.
